name: Toffee Apples and Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and core the apples, cutting each into 8 large wedges.
2. Peel the bananas and cut them into 1 1/2-inch chunks.
3. Combine the flour, cornstarch, egg, and 1 teaspoon of sesame oil in a small bowl. Mix well to form a smooth, very thick batter.
4. Heat peanut oil with 2 teaspoons of sesame oil in a deep fat fryer or wok until moderately hot.
5. Place fruit into the batter mixture using a slotted spoon, draining excess batter.
6. Deep-fry for about 2 minutes until golden; drain on paper towels.
7. Repeat frying all fruit.
8. Prepare an ice water bowl and reheat oil to moderate heat.
9. Deep-fry fruit again for about 2 minutes, then drain on paper towels.
10. Mix sugar, sesame seeds, and 2 tablespoons of frying oil in a pot; heat until sugar melts and caramelizes (watch to prevent burning).
11. When caramel is light brown, add fruit sections; gently stir to coat.
12. Place coated fruit into ice water to harden; do a few at a time to avoid sticking.
13. Remove from water and serve on a platter immediately.
